text:
A $500 ACH deposit sitting past 4 business days without updating your balance is worth a direct look — I'm passing this to our payments ops team to check its status. ACH doesn't process on weekends, so any Saturday or Sunday in that window can add a day, but four business days warrants escalation either way.

Send the last 4 digits of the account you deposited from and roughly when you submitted it, and they'll track it down and follow up with what they find.

Novig Support
